texto: Why, you boggle-eyed, flap-tongued, drag-bellied offspring of unmentionable algae! You seething little leprous blotch of bat-nibbled fungus! You cringing parasite on the underside of a dwarfish and ignoble worm!
explicacao: Citação de Lewis Padgett sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Why, you boggle-eyed, flap-tongued, drag-bellied offspring of unmentionable algae! You seething l…” articula reflexao, humorous, boggle em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
